'''鈭歴-f-w-dh''' ('''kasafwedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jury|jury]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jury|jury]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-f-w-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kasafwedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafwedhoko|thisafwedhoko]] || [[word:jisafwedhoko|jisafwedhoko]] || [[word:shisafwedhoko|shisafwedhoko]] || [[word:kisafwedhoko|kisafwedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
